anti_claim: This growth does not authorize research replication benchmark scores, live paper replication claims, autonomous scientific discovery claims, private dataset export, raw screenshot authority, live GUI/browser/mobile account automation, benchmark performance claims, hidden-gold-label access, evaluator tampering, public-root implementation, release, or publication.
authority_boundary: macro-side ledger/projection refinement only; no raw private source body, live GUI account, live benchmark environment, private dataset, provider payload, raw screenshot body, or public-root implementation file was used as authority

external_attention_inputs.signal: Research-agent evaluation is moving toward end-to-end paper replication with hierarchical rubrics, artifact execution, and judge validation.
Scientific reproducibility benchmarks measure whether agents can rerun published studies from code/data with task levels and parallel evaluation.
Data-driven scientific discovery agents need individual workflow-task evaluation, executable programs, costs, and contamination mitigation before end-to-end claims.
Scientific visualization agents need multi-step analysis benchmarks with deterministic, code, rule, image, case-specific, human, and LLM evaluator agreement.
Real computer-use agents need setup, execution-based evaluation, cross-app workflows, and GUI grounding evidence across operating systems.
Mobile agents need dynamic task parameterization, initialization/success/teardown logic, and robustness to task variations.
Multimodal web agents need visually grounded tasks where image-text interpretation and website action traces are evaluated together.
Tool-using LLM agents need exploit opportunities, shortcut detection, and environmental hardening measured directly.
Evaluation integrity for ML-engineering agents must measure evaluator tampering, train/test leakage, file-access logs, and trusted-reference grading.
Terminal-agent environments can be task-specifically reward-hackable, so benchmark fixtures need exploit taxonomy and monitorability receipts.
Static benchmarks face saturation and contamination; dynamic/adaptive benchmark structures and uncertainty estimates are becoming more salient.

projection_contract: Project these only as synthetic replay receipts: research_replication_rubric_artifact_replay, scientific_data_figure_claim_lineage_replay, multimodal_gui_affordance_state_grounding_replay, and agent_benchmark_integrity_anti_gaming_replay folded under proof_diagnostic_evidence_spine, mission_transaction_work_spine, agent_route_observability_runtime, and external_boundary_anti_corruption_runtime.
